location: Dropped (2% chance) by hammer-wielding Ancestral Follower enemies near the Ancestral Woods grace in Siofra River.
tactics: From the Ancestral Woods grace, head northeast to find two Ancestral Followers patrolling below the large 'singing' tree-spirit enemy — an easy, isolated pair to farm.
A third hammer-wielding Ancestral Follower guards a flame altar west of the Worshippers' Woods grace as a second farming spot.
Drop rate is low (2% at 100 Discovery), so rest-and-repeat farming with Discovery gear is recommended.
Ancestral Followers hit hard and can combo — don't trade blows carelessly without checking stamina and health first.
lore: A thick horn ringed like tree growth, repurposed into a bludgeon by the ancestral follower warriors. It's said to carry the lingering power of ancestor spirits, restoring some of the wielder's vitality on a killing blow.

builds.name: Aggressive Strength sustain build
builds.why: Strength-focused scaling plus a passive HP-restore-on-kill effect (which stacks with similar weapons like the Blasphemous Blade) rewards an aggressive, kill-chaining playstyle that stays topped up without flasks.
